parent.snippet: Members include AI engineers, ML researchers, developers, founders, and builders from the local Hyderabad chapter. A typical AI Tinkerers Hyderabad meetup runs about three hours with live demos from local builders, technical Q&A, and networking. Demos are expected to show real systems or code, not sales decks.
